welcomeHeadlinePrefix: Pass the exam by reading the
welcomeSubtitle: Study in English. Spot the Finnish clue words. Pass.
feature1Body: Finnish inflections included — the exact words that appear on the exam.
feature2Body: Learn which Finnish words signal correct vs wrong answers, even with weak Finnish.
feature3Body: Across all 4 official exam categories, with full clue-word explanations.
feature4Body: Exam-realistic simulation with scoring and review.
guestPreview: Just looking? Browse a limited preview →
slide1Body: The exam is in Finnish, but you don’t have to be. Read every question and answer in English alongside the original Finnish.
slide2Body: Finnish “trigger words” quietly signal the right answer. We teach you to spot them — so you pass even with weak Finnish.
slide3Body: 300+ questions across all 4 official categories, plus 5 timed model tests scored exactly like Traficom’s.
slide4Body: Browsing as a guest? You get “How to use the app” and the Exam Guide. Create a free account to unlock vocabulary, practice, clue words and model tests.
